title: Slow Roasted Algerian Plum Tomatoes Tagine
description: A resinous and gooey meal prep Algerian dish featuring plum tomatoes, yakimono grill, and shojin friendly ingredients, perfect for a hearty dinner
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to 300 degrees Fahrenheit
Cut the plum tomatoes in half and place them on a baking sheet
Drizzle the olive oil over the tomatoes and sprinkle with garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Roast the tomatoes in the preheated grill for 2 hours
Stir the tomatoes every 30 minutes to ensure even cooking
After 2 hours, remove the tomatoes from the grill and let them cool
Once cooled, transfer the tomatoes to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
